WORLDSMITH.Intro: Import Worldsmith creature and companion exports as dnd5e NPC actors. Upload one or more .json files and/or paste JSON below.
WORLDSMITH.FilesHint: You can select multiple files at once.
WORLDSMITH.PastePlaceholder: Paste a single creature object or an array of creatures here...
WORLDSMITH.NoInput: Select at least one file or paste some JSON before importing.
